caption: A man with short brown hair, wearing a grey t-shirt and black over-ear headphones, sits in a recording studio. He is positioned behind a large, dark grey computer monitor that partially obscures the left side of the frame. To his right is a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm, and behind him is a black acoustic foam wall with vertical ridges. In the foreground, a few white papers are visible on the desk. Across the sequence, the man is speaking into the microphone. He begins with a neutral but attentive expression, which transitions into a wide smile and slight laughter, causing his eyes to crinkle and his cheeks to lift. His posture remains consistent, slightly leaning toward the microphone as his facial expression evolves from a focused gaze to an expression of amusement.
